svg.title: Sankalp vs Palantir Ontology gap analysis
svg.desc: Four-pillar comparison: Data, Logic, Action, Security — showing what Sankalp has, what is partial, and what is missing.

g.text: Sankalp vs Palantir Ontology — gap analysis

svg.text: CSV → SQLite raw → gold pipeline (Ganana + Shodhan)
Neo4j knowledge graph — objects, properties, links (Bandhan)
LLM-driven reasoning (Groq + RAG over doctrine rules)
Event-driven automations / triggers (e.g. score drops below threshold)
Logic versioning & audit trail (who changed which rule, when)
Write-back actions: log mission / op / sortie → Neo4j
Atomic multi-step transactions (e.g. reassign crew + update mission)
Writeback to external source systems (ERP, logistics APIs)
